description:
Floating canvas for drawing, annotating, and highlighting over other apps. DrawAnywhere lets you sketch, annotate, and highlight directly on top of any screen. Great for following along video courses, recording tutorials, or hosting presentations. Highlights:
  • Freehand, rectangle, ellipse, and laser pointer tools
  • Infinite canvas with pinch-to-zoom
  • Pixel eraser and stylus-button stroke eraser
  • Three-level viewport lock (none, zoom only, all)
  • HSV color picker with presets, recent colors, and hex input
  • 50-step undo/redo
  • Touch passthrough to the app below
  • Hover preview circle showing brush size during drawing
  • Quick Settings tile to toggle the service
Tips:
  • Long press and drag to move the toolbar.
  • Two-finger pinch to zoom; double-tap to reset zoom; triple-tap to reset position.
  • Three-finger double-tap to toggle passthrough; triple-tap to hide canvas.
  • After 3 seconds of inactivity, the toolbar becomes more transparent.
  • Turn on Clear canvas on hide to auto-clear when hiding the canvas.
    Note: touch passthrough will be turned off automatically as well.
  • Turn off Open canvas on start to hide the canvas on startup.
Source is available on GitHub: https://github.com/DrawAnywhere/DrawAnywhere
